seo.title: MemohAI - The Agent OS | Self-hosted & Containerized Isolation
seo.description: Memoh is an Agent OS built for hackers and AI developers. Self-hosted, highly concurrent, and zero telemetry. Featuring containerized isolation and long-term memory for secure agent orchestration.

hero.title: The Agent OS
hero.subtitle: Self-hosted, highly concurrent, zero telemetry. Built for hackers and AI developers.

install.title: Deploy in one command
install.subtitle: A single script handles the containers, memory stores, and models. Say goodbye to dependency hell and get your Agent OS running instantly.

usecases.title: Built for Production Scenarios
usecases.subtitle: From personal assistants to massive automation scripts, Memoh provides the sandboxes and memory backend to keep your agents running flawlessly.

f1.title: Multi-Bot & Multi-User
f1.desc: Ditch the simple chatbox. Spin up a whole squad of agents that recognize users in group chats and talk to each other.

f2.title: Containerized Isolation
f2.desc: Every agent gets its own sandbox. Even if it runs malicious code or crashes hard, your host machine doesn't feel a thing.

f3.title: Memory Engineering
f3.desc: True long-term memory. Agents quietly extract facts from your chats. Hybrid search ensures they never drop context.

f4.title: Omnichannel Native
f4.desc: Write once, run anywhere. Hook your agents directly into Telegram, Discord, Matrix, or WeChat without rebuilding.

f5.title: MCP Ecosystem
f5.desc: Native MCP support. Stop writing glue code. Let your agents control your local machine and endless external APIs directly.

f6.title: Browser Automation
f6.desc: Headless browser automation. Backed by Playwright, agents can scrape, navigate, and fill out forms exactly like you do.

f7.title: Skills & Subagents
f7.desc: Keep it modular. Grab skills from the registry or spawn sub-agents to handle the messy, independent tasks in the background.

f8.title: Discussion Sessions
f8.desc: Advanced multi-threading. Use slash commands to pause, inspect, and debug your agent's exact thought process in real-time.

f9.title: Workflow Automation
f9.desc: Built-in cron jobs. Tell your agent to wake up at 3 AM, scrape the daily logs, and drop a summary in your inbox.

f10.title: Professional Web UI
f10.desc: A dashboard you actually want to use. Watch streams, debug tool calls, and peek into container files right from your browser.

f11.title: Access Control (ACL)
f11.desc: Secure by default. Set up tight ACLs based on user IDs or channels. You decide exactly who gets to trigger what.

f12.title: Multi-Model Routing
f12.desc: Bring your own models. Plug into OpenAI, Anthropic, or point it at your local Ollama node to save some cash.

f13.title: Instant Deployment
f13.desc: Zero fuss deployment. Just Docker. It handles migrations and CNI networking so you can boot the cluster in under three minutes.

gallery.title: Platform Features
gallery.subtitle: A glimpse into the core capabilities of the Memoh ecosystem.

desc.d1:
Chat with your agents anywhere. Memory syncs across all your devices in real-time.
From private DMs to chaotic group chats, they never lose the plot.
desc.d2:
Every agent is locked in its own 'private room' with zero access to host files.
If a script goes rogue or crashes, it stays in the box. No harm done.
desc.d3:
Plug in your favorite LLMs, or point it at your local Ollama cluster.
Mix and match compute engines like Lego to get the best bang for your buck.
desc.d4:
Skip the terminal. Manage private files inside containers with a clean web view.
Control exactly who sees what, keeping all agent-generated data totally secure.
desc.d5:
Set up cron tasks and heartbeats to keep agents busy while you sleep.
Whether it's daily scraping or syncing docs, they handle the heavy lifting.
desc.d6:
Stop guessing where your budget goes. Track every token and cent in real-time.
Spot exactly which models are burning cash and where you can save power.

a1.title: Containerized Isolation
a1.desc: Every bot runs in its own 'virtual computer' via containerd. Isolated filesystems and networks ensure the host is safe even if a tool fails.

a2.title: Advanced Memory
a2.desc: Pluggable hybrid retrieval (Dense + Sparse + BM25) paired with LLM-driven fact extraction. Bots maintain autonomous long-term recall.

a3.title: Omnichannel Native
a3.desc: First-class support for Telegram, Discord, Lark, WeChat, Matrix, and Email. Deploy your agent logic once and interact anywhere.
